title: Docs data from board column
excerpt:
Hi guys, does monday.com workdoc support automated doc creation based on the data from column? 
It’s something like https://reactivepad.com/ 
Or is there any marketplace apps able to do this?

posts.author: elysium27 (Hendrik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys, does monday.com workdoc support automated doc creation based on the data from column?

It’s something like https://reactivepad.com/

Or is there any marketplace apps able to do this?
